message:
refactor(decision): export DRO module and add apply_dro_control

- Add pub mod dro to decision module exports
- Export DRO types: DroError, DroLoss, DroOutcome, DroTrigger
- Export DRO functions: apply_dro_gate, compute_adaptive_epsilon,
  compute_wasserstein_dro, decide_with_dro, is_de_escalation
- Export apply_dro_control from expected_loss module

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
